title: Open Loop Operating System
summary: Implemented the first-class open-loop layer that combines model-deduped todos, CRM links, and deep memory recall.
next_action: Review live Telegram and agent behavior after launch and tune snapshot ranking with production evidence.

verification.notes: `mix precommit` passed on 2026-05-09 after implementing OpenLoops, MCP/Telegram tools, runtime prompt injection, and focused OpenLoops coverage.

resume_context.last_completed_step: Implemented OpenLoops ingestion/snapshotting, exposed get_open_loops across MCP and Telegram, injected compact open-loop context into agent runtimes, fixed prompt formatting recursion, and passed precommit.
resume_context.notes: Person and memory enrichment uses explicit structured model/tool output, not local name heuristics. Automatic runtime snapshots skip nested memory recall because deep_memory is injected separately.

history.note: Created implementation spec from product request and OpenClaw comparison.

Completed the open-loop operating layer with OpenLoops service APIs, model-deduped todo ingestion, explicit CRM/memory enrichment, MCP and Telegram get_open_loops tools, runtime prompt injection, focused tests, and passing `mix precommit`.
